column5: [run2] **Recurring formatting pattern**: many PRI-derived rows have trailing `?.` (question mark followed by period) in their descriptions (e.g., EXEMPT_GOVT_OFFICIAL_CAPACITY, EXEMPT_GOVT_PARTIAL_RELIEF, PARITY_GOVT_AS_LOBBYIST, PARITY_GOVT_AS_PRINCIPAL, DEF_PUBLIC_ENTITY, RPT_PRINCIPAL_GATE, RPT_PRINCIPAL_CONTACT, RPT_PRINCIPAL_LOBBYIST_NAMES, RPT_PRINCIPAL_LOBBYIST_CONTACT, RPT_PRINCIPAL_BUSINESS_NATURE, RPT_PRINCIPAL_ISSUE_GENERAL, RPT_PRINCIPAL_BILL_SPECIFIC, RPT_PRINCIPAL_CONTACTS_LOGGED, RPT_PRINCIPAL_FINANCIAL_CONTRIBUTORS, RPT_LOBBYIST_GATE, RPT_LOBBYIST_CONTACT, RPT_LOBBYIST_PRINCIPAL_NAMES, RPT_LOBBYIST_PRINCIPAL_CONTACT, RPT_LOBBYIST_PRINCIPAL_NATURE, RPT_LOBBYIST_ISSUE_GENERAL, RPT_LOBBYIST_BILL_SPECIFIC, RPT_LOBBYIST_CONTACTS_LOGGED, ~24 PRI-A/B/E rows). Each is a verbatim PRI question ending in `?` plus a `.` period the loader added. Harmless functionally but indicates `compendium/disclosure_items.csv` was generated by appending `.` to PRI item_text without stripping trailing punctuation. Flag for Phase 1 cosmetic-cleanup batch.
column6: single-run flag, run2 only | run2 note: confidence: high; `other-issue` per plan §"churn" guidance
